serviceDescription: Amazon Braket is a fully managed quantum computing service that helps researchers and developers get started with the technology to accelerate research and discovery. Amazon Braket provides a development environment for you to explore and build quantum algorithms, test them on quantum circuit simulators, and run them on different quantum hardware technologies.

cards.title: Simulators
cards.helpText: With Amazon Braket, you have a choice of four quantum circuit simulators to run and test quantum algorithms, including the local simulator in the Amazon Braket SDK, and three fully managed simulators: SV1, DM1, and TN1. SV1 is a general purpose quantum circuit simulator, and DM1 enables you to simulate the effect of noise on your circuits, whereas TN1 specializes in larger scale simulations for certain types of quantum circuits. All fully managed simulators automatically scale AWS computing resources to deliver high-performance execution of your quantum algorithms.

cards.title: IonQ
cards.helpText: IonQ is one of the quantum hardware providers available through Amazon Braket. IonQ offers two quantum processors - Forte and Aria - that you can access through the Amazon Braket service.

cards.title: IQM
cards.helpText: IQM is one of the quantum hardware providers available through Amazon Braket. IQM offers the Garnet quantum processor that you can access through the Amazon Braket service.

cards.title: QuEra
cards.helpText: QuEra is one of the quantum hardware providers available through Amazon Braket. QuEra offers the Aquila quantum processor that you can access through the Amazon Braket service.

cards.title: Rigetti
cards.helpText: Rigetti is one of the quantum hardware providers available through Amazon Braket. Rigetti offers the Ankaa quantum processor that you can access through the Amazon Braket service.
